$comment: PROPOSAL ONLY — reviewable candidate content for the Bouldering V5 world. NOT loaded by the live app. No node here is rendered until the user approves it. Edge relationship types and shared-capability references are described in docs/v5-skill-tree-review.md.

sharedCapabilities.name: 10 Strict Pull-Ups
sharedCapabilities.note: One underlying pulling capability; each world shows its own view but progress comes from the same benchmark.

sharedCapabilities.name: Weighted Pull-Up
sharedCapabilities.note: Supports Bar Muscle-Up strength reserve and V5 performance; not required to climb V5.

sharedCapabilities.name: Active Dead Hang
sharedCapabilities.note: Grip/shoulder base shared by pull-up development and climbing.

sharedCapabilities.name: Hollow Body / Core Tension
sharedCapabilities.note: Body-line tension shared by the muscle-up and steep climbing.

nodes.name: Consolidate V1
nodes.description: Several V1 problems across multiple styles — not a single lucky send.
nodes.rationale: Matches the existing live b_v1 milestone; carried forward unchanged.

nodes.name: Consolidate V2
nodes.description: Deepen movement vocabulary at intermediate grade.
nodes.rationale: Existing live milestone.

nodes.name: Consolidate V3
nodes.description: Grade where technique starts to matter more than raw strength.
nodes.rationale: Existing live milestone.

nodes.name: First V4
nodes.description: A grade jump requiring good footwork and body tension.
nodes.rationale: Existing live milestone (b_v4).

nodes.name: Consolidate V4
nodes.description: Make V4 reliable across styles before projecting V5.
nodes.rationale: New node — consolidation reduces the jump to V5; optional but recommended.

nodes.name: First V5 Send
nodes.description: The central milestone of this world — a clean V5 send.
nodes.caveat: Gate on no active pain before a maximal attempt.
nodes.rationale: Existing live milestone (b_v5).

nodes.name: Silent Feet
nodes.description: Precise, quiet foot placement — the base of efficient technique.
nodes.rationale: Existing live skill.

nodes.name: Flagging
nodes.description: Balance without an extra foothold — saves energy.
nodes.rationale: Existing live skill; a movement branch, not a strict prerequisite for V5.

nodes.name: Drop Knee
nodes.description: Brings the body closer to the wall and extends reach.
nodes.rationale: Movement vocabulary; ALTERNATIVE branch to flagging rather than sequential.

nodes.name: Deadpoint
nodes.description: Dynamic catch at the peak of movement.
nodes.rationale: Distinct movement branch — parallel to flagging/drop-knee, not a chain.

nodes.name: Heel Hook
nodes.description: Foot as a third hand on overhangs.
nodes.rationale: Existing live skill.

nodes.name: Route Preview / Reading
nodes.description: Plan the sequence before climbing — saves attempts.
nodes.rationale: Existing live tactic.

nodes.name: Crux Identification
nodes.description: Isolate the hardest move and a plan for it.
nodes.rationale: New tactic node split out from generic projecting.

nodes.name: Structured Attempts
nodes.description: Work a hard problem methodically rather than flailing.
nodes.rationale: Existing live projecting, renamed for clarity.

nodes.name: Rest Between Attempts
nodes.description: Full recovery between hard tries to preserve quality.
nodes.rationale: New node; may merge into Structured Attempts if it feels redundant in review.

nodes.name: Multi-Session Projecting
nodes.description: Commit to a project across sessions until sent.
nodes.rationale: Existing live milestone; UNLOCKS_ASSESSMENT for First V5.

nodes.name: First Strict Pull-Up
nodes.description: The entry pulling milestone; shared with the Bar Muscle-Up world.
nodes.rationale: SHARED capability — reuse pulling state, do not duplicate.

nodes.name: 5 Strict Pull-Ups
nodes.description: Pulling base for steep terrain; shared with Bar Muscle-Up.
nodes.rationale: SHARED capability.

nodes.name: 10 Strict Pull-Ups
nodes.description: Strength reserve for repeated hard pulls; supports V5 without being required.
nodes.caveat: SUPPORTS V5, not REQUIRED — strong climbers send V5 without 10 strict pull-ups.
nodes.rationale: SHARED capability with mu_pull10.

nodes.name: Weighted Pull-Up Introduction
nodes.description: Introduce light added load once 10 strict pull-ups are solid.
nodes.caveat: REQUIRES 10 strict pull-ups before adding load — do not program weight earlier.
nodes.rationale: New node; gates weighted work behind a bodyweight base.

nodes.name: Weighted Pull-Up Benchmark
nodes.description: A meaningful added-load benchmark (e.g. +20% bodyweight for a clean single).
nodes.caveat: SUPPORTS V5 performance; never a hard requirement to attempt V5.
nodes.rationale: SHARED capability; exact target to be confirmed in review.

nodes.name: Lock-Off Control
nodes.description: Hold a bent-arm lock while the other hand reaches.
nodes.rationale: Existing live b_lockoff, folded into the pulling lane.

nodes.name: Explosive Pulling
nodes.description: Fast pulling power for dynamic moves; optional support.
nodes.caveat: Optional — only relevant for dynamic/overhang styles.
nodes.rationale: New optional support; may be out of scope for a first V5.

nodes.name: Active Dead Hang
nodes.description: Active shoulders + grip endurance base; shared with pull-up development.
nodes.rationale: SHARED capability (deadhang_secs).

nodes.name: Grip Endurance
nodes.description: Sustained gripping capacity over a climb, not a single max.
nodes.rationale: New node; endurance distinct from max grip.

nodes.name: Forearm Strength
nodes.description: General forearm/flexor strength to protect elbows and hold harder positions.
nodes.rationale: New node; general (not finger-specific) forearm work.

nodes.name: Wrist Roller / General Forearm
nodes.description: Wrist roller or equivalent — balanced forearm development, elbow health.
nodes.rationale: ALTERNATIVE means of building forearm capacity.

nodes.name: Controlled Hanging Capacity
nodes.description: Controlled hangs on progressively smaller jugs/edges (large holds only).

criteria.label: Controlled hang on a large edge

nodes.caveat: Large edges / jugs only. NOT small-edge fingerboarding.
nodes.rationale: Bridges hang endurance to on-the-wall grip without finger loading.

nodes.name: Advanced Finger Strength (Optional)
nodes.description: Structured small-edge / fingerboard hangs — advanced only.
nodes.caveat: OPTIONAL and ADVANCED. Not a beginner default. High finger-injury risk; gate behind years of climbing and no finger pain.
nodes.rationale: Explicitly optional per brief; must never be a default V5 requirement.

nodes.name: Hollow Body Hold
nodes.description: A tight body line; shared with the Bar Muscle-Up world.
nodes.rationale: SHARED capability.

nodes.name: Hanging Knee / Leg Raise
nodes.description: Bring the feet up under control — essential for steep footwork.
nodes.rationale: New node; overlaps mu_knee — candidate shared node.

nodes.name: Overhang Body Tension
nodes.description: Keep the feet on the wall on steep terrain.
nodes.rationale: Existing live b_overhang.

nodes.name: Controlled Hip Position
nodes.description: Turn the hip to the wall to reduce load and extend reach.
nodes.rationale: New node; technique/strength blend.

nodes.name: Tension Between Distant Holds
nodes.description: Maintain whole-body tension across a big span without cutting feet.
nodes.rationale: New node; SUPPORTS First V5.

nodes.name: Controlled High Step
nodes.description: Load and stand up on a high foot with control.
nodes.rationale: New lane root; directly SUPPORTS First V4/V5.

nodes.name: Deep Split-Squat Foundation
nodes.description: Single-leg strength base before pistols.
nodes.rationale: New node; foundation for single-leg strength.

nodes.name: Pistol Squat Progression
nodes.description: Full single-leg squat — strong high-step and rock-over power.
nodes.caveat: SUPPORTS high-step strength; NOT required to climb V5.
nodes.rationale: New node; SUPPORTS, never REQUIRED for V5.

nodes.name: Rock-Over Strength
nodes.description: Commit weight over a high foot and stand through it.
nodes.rationale: New node; ties leg strength to wall movement.

nodes.name: Weight Transfer
nodes.description: Smoothly shift weight between feet to unweight the hands.
nodes.rationale: New skill node; may merge with High-Step integration.

nodes.name: High-Step Integration on the Wall
nodes.description: Apply high-step and rock-over strength on real problems.
nodes.rationale: New node; SUPPORTS First V4/V5.

proposedExercises.name: Wrist Roller
proposedExercises.purpose: Balanced forearm development and elbow health.
proposedExercises.note: New exercise proposed alongside the grip lane; not yet in the live catalog.

proposedExercises.name: Pistol Squat
proposedExercises.purpose: Single-leg strength for high steps and rock-overs.
proposedExercises.note: New exercise proposed alongside the legs lane; not yet in the live catalog.

proposedExercises.name: High-Step Drill
proposedExercises.note: New exercise proposed alongside the legs lane; not yet in the live catalog.

display.note: Required vs supporting paths must be visually distinct (solid vs dashed). Shared nodes show a badge indicating the capability is mirrored from another world.
